## Content policy acknowledgement

> The library's content policy (see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md))
> requires that the `drm/` category, in particular, must not name any
> specific DRM system. The same policy is recommended for DRM-adjacent
> content elsewhere in the repo.

- [ ] This entry does not name any specific DRM system.
- [ ] If this entry is in `drm/`, it describes architectures and
  protocol shapes; readers who know the space will recognise the
  systems, but the names are not in the text.
